'''Fargane''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ansionian]] who was one of the seven delegates of the [[Unity Council]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was the tallest, oldest, and best educated of the Ansionians on the Council, and apparently its leader. He was from [[Hurkaset]]. At first in favor of succession from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], he eventually voted against it.<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
